title: Femboy Optimized
description: The *BEST* FPS boosting and PvP QOL modpack out there. Filled to the brim with loads of the best FPS boosting mods there is. There are also a few QOL mods, such as Shulkerbox Tool Tips, InvHud+ and more. Definitely try it out!
body:
Welcome to the Femboy Optimized project! We are dedicated to making the best possible FPS boosting modpack out there, while still including a few light-weight PvP QOL mods. The modpack is based on Sodium Fabric, and has loads of different mods to ensure maximum FPS. The first version of this modpack is based on 1.20.1, but this may change in the future as the modpack gets more downloads and traction. If you have any questions or suggestions, please refer to my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/BxYxcdPpWD).




<details>
<summary>Included Mods (alphabetical order) (60 mods)</summary>
